things.name: Sagrada Familia
things.description: Antoni Gaudi's extraordinary UNESCO-listed basilica still under construction since 1882

things.name: Park Guell
things.description: Gaudi's colourful UNESCO hilltop park with mosaic terraces and gingerbread gatehouses

things.name: Casa Batllo
things.description: Gaudi's dragon-spine building on the Passeig de Gracia, a masterpiece of organic design

things.name: La Rambla
things.description: Barcelona's famous tree-lined pedestrian boulevard from Plaza Catalunya to the sea

things.name: Gothic Quarter
things.description: Labyrinthine medieval centre with the Barcelona Cathedral and Roman remains

things.name: Barceloneta Beach
things.description: City beach backed by seafood restaurants stretching along the Mediterranean coast

things.name: Palau de la Musica Catalana
things.description: Extraordinary UNESCO Art Nouveau concert hall by Lluís Domènech i Montaner

things.name: Camp Nou
things.description: Home of FC Barcelona, one of the world's largest football stadiums

things.name: Montjuic
things.description: Hilltop park with the 1992 Olympic stadium, castle and Miro Foundation

things.name: La Boqueria Market
things.description: Legendary covered market on La Rambla bursting with fresh produce and tapas bars
